job_description:
Associate - QA Engineer

At 2Base, we are rebuilding the Quality function into a precision-driven, ownership-based, product-aligned capability. This is a foundational Quality Analyst role responsible for understanding requirements deeply, validating system behaviour logically, and ensuring development outputs are correct, testable, and aligned with business intent.

As an Associate - QA Engineer, you will act as the quality gatekeeper of the system. You will learn to think in workflows, edge cases, data states, and system behaviour, not just screens. Your work will directly impact product stability, customer trust, and release confidence.

Key Responsibilities: - Understand and analyse BRD, SRS, user stories, and functional documents before testing. - Convert requirements into structured and logical test scenarios. - Assist in writing detailed, structured, and traceable test cases. - Perform manual testing for web and mobile applications. - Execute system testing, integration testing, regression testing, browser compatibility testing, and responsive testing to ensure the application functions correctly across different environments and devices. - Identify edge cases, alternate flows, and boundary conditions. - Log, document, and track defects with clarity and reproducibility. - Validate fixes and ensure no regression impact. - Support the creation and maintenance of test reports. - Collaborate closely with Business Analysts and Developers to clarify expected behaviours. - Participate in Agile/Scrum meetings and sprint-level validation. - Gradually learn automation basics and structured testing approaches, AI testing tools. - Take ownership of assigned modules and ensure release readiness.

Requirements: - Basic understanding of software testing concepts and QA processes. - Strong attention to detail and structured thinking ability. - Willingness to deeply understand business logic before testing. - Ability to think beyond happy paths and identify edge cases and risks. - Good written and verbal communication skills. - Analytical thinking and curiosity to question unexpected system behaviour. - Ability to work with minimal supervision in a fast-paced environment. - Strong documentation skills for defect reporting and test case writing. - Interest in learning automation, AI testing methodologies and structured QA. - Positive attitude and ownership mindset.

Experience & Education: - Freshers / Candidates with internship experience - Recent graduates or students from the 2025 /2026 batch pursuing or holding a Diploma, Degree, or B.Tech in IT, CS, or MCA.

Good to have: - Familiarity with defect tracking tools, Postman for API basics - ISTQB certifications or equivalent.

Benefits: - A growth-driven environment with opportunities to lead, innovate, and upskill continuously.

Contact: If this opportunity aligns with your career goals, kindly share your updated resume with us at careers@2basetechnologies.com.
summary: Entry-level QA role ensuring product stability through testing, collaboration, and structured QA processes. Focus on manual testing, edge case analysis, and Agile workflows for recent graduates.

job_description:

job_description:
Senior Business Analyst

At 2Base, we are rebuilding the Business Analyst function into a world-class, product-minded, clarity-driven team. This role is not a documentation role. It is not a screen updater role. It is not a support role. This is a core Business Analyst position responsible for functional modeling, system reasoning, requirement clarity, and building the foundation for correct development.

Key Responsibilities

  • Lead requirement workshops, client calls, and discovery discussions to understand business needs clearly.
  • Ask deeper questions, challenge assumptions, and validate the true business intent behind every requirement.
  • Convert ambiguous client inputs into structured, logical, and actionable functional understanding.
  • Break large features into modules, workflows, components, and clear dependencies.
  • Build strong system-level understanding involving APIs, integrations, data flow, and backend considerations.
  • Translate business processes into functional logic that development teams can execute.
  • Decompose requirements into use-case flows, system behaviours, edge cases, alternate paths, validation rules, and dependencies.
  • Prepare high-quality documentation, including BRD, FRD, SRS, workflows, state diagrams, data-flow diagrams, API requirement specs, and acceptance criteria.
  • Ensure all documentation is clear, logical, structured, testable, and ready for developers and QA to use.
  • Collaborate closely with developers, architects, QA, and product owners to validate feasibility and align understanding.
  • Ensure QA teams can derive test cases effectively from your functional logic and acceptance criteria.
  • Communicate confidently with clients, handle requirement discussions smoothly, and clarify misunderstandings immediately.
  • Push back politely on unclear or changing requirements and ensure final decisions are documented properly.
  • Maintain requirement traceability throughout the lifecycle and ensure zero ambiguity during handover to development.
  • Own the entire requirement lifecycle from discovery to development readiness with high accountability.
  • Drive clarity across teams by ensuring every requirement is complete, validated, and logically consistent.

Required Skills & Experience

  • Minimum 4+ years of core Business Analyst experience with strong analytical and system-level thinking.
  • Ability to break down complex requirements into clear components, workflows, and functional logic.
  • Excellent verbal and written communication with confidence in client interactions and clarifications.
  • Proven experience in preparing SRS, BRD, FRD, workflows, and acceptance criteria with high clarity.
  • Ability to challenge assumptions politely, ask the right questions, and ensure zero ambiguity.
  • Strong collaboration experience with development, QA, architects, and cross-functional teams.
  • Understanding of API behaviours, integrations, data flows, and multi-module system interactions.
  • Ability to run requirement discussions, workshops, and independently lead discovery sessions.
  • Exposure to SaaS, scalable products, automation, or AI-supported systems is an added advantage.
  • Demonstrated ownership of requirements end-to-end, ensuring developer-ready and testable outputs.
  • Not suitable for UI-only thinkers, passive communicators, template-based writers, or those relying on AI for answers.
  • Success is defined by clear, testable requirements, zero rework, strong cross-team alignment, and confident communication.
  • Candidates must align with 2Base’s structured thinking, clarity-driven culture, and transformation of the BA function.

Minimum Qualifications

  • Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Engineering, Business, or related field
  • 4 to 8 years of experience as a Business Analyst or Product Analyst
  • Experience in SaaS or scalable product environments
  • Exposure to AI/Automation, integrations, or multi-module systems
  • Ability to run independent client workshops
  • Must have independently handled requirement ownership for at least one full project lifecycle

Benefits

  • A growth-driven environment with opportunities to lead, innovate, and upskill continuously.

If this opportunity aligns with your career goals, kindly share your updated resume with us at careers@2basetechnologies.com.
summary: Senior Business Analyst at 2Base drives functional modeling, requirement clarity, and cross-team collaboration to ensure precise, testable requirements for scalable product development.

job_description:

  • Analyze requirements to identify gaps, ambiguities, and inconsistencies, and work with Core BAs to resolve them
  • Document functional flows, business rules, and acceptance criteria where applicable to support development and QA teams
  • Document wireframes, UI flows, validations, and UI specifications in collaboration with design and product teams
  • Maintain change logs, version history, and document updates throughout the project lifecycle
  • Create and manage traceability matrices linking business, functional, and technical requirements
  • Maintain cross-references across BRD, SRS, UI, API, and related documentation
  • Ensure documentation consistency, completeness, and alignment with approved scope and delivery timelines
  • Ensure accurate and timely PMS updates with structured documentation details
  • Support development, QA, UAT, and audit processes through clear, traceable, and up-to-date documentation
  • Assist in requirement reviews, walkthroughs, and validation sessions with internal and client stakeholders

Required Skills and Experience

  • 1 to 4 years of experience in Business Analysis documentation or related roles
  • Strong experience in BRD and SRS creation
  • Hands-on experience with documentation templates, standards, and version control
  • Ability to document UI wireframes and functional flows clearly
  • Working knowledge of APIs and system integrations for documentation purposes
  • Experience with project management systems and documentation tools
  • Strong attention to detail and ability to manage multiple documents in parallel
  • Excellent written communication and stakeholder coordination skills

Minimum Qualifications

  • Bachelor’s degree in Engineering, Computer Science, Information Systems, or a related field
  • 1 to 4 years of experience as a Business Analyst or Product Analyst

Benefits

  • A growth-driven environment with opportunities to lead, innovate, and upskill continuously.
  • Contact: Share your updated resume at careers@2basetechnologies.com

In this role, you will be responsible for designing, securing, and scaling our AWS environment while building high-performance CI/CD engines using GitLab.   • Automation Scripting: Proficiency in Python or Go for automating manual tasks and building custom cloud tooling.
  • Containerization: Strong hands-on experience with Docker and Kubernetes (EKS) orchestration.

job_description:

Brief Description

We are seeking a highly skilled and experienced Senior QA Engineer with expertise in both manual and automation testing. The ideal candidate will have hands-on experience with Selenium with Java and Playwright, and a proven ability to design, develop, and maintain robust test automation frameworks. The role involves collaborating with development and product teams to ensure high-quality software delivery across multiple projects.

Key Responsibilities

  • Design, develop, and maintain automation test frameworks using Selenium with Java and Playwright.
  • Perform comprehensive manual testing (functional, regression, integration, smoke, UAT).
  • Create detailed test plans, test cases, and test execution reports.
  • Identify, document, and track defects using tools like JIRA.
  • Collaborate with developers, business analysts, and project managers during all SDLC phases.
  • Participate in scrum ceremonies (daily standups, sprint planning, retrospectives).
  • Conduct root cause analysis of defects and provide actionable feedback.
  • Review requirements and user stories for testability and quality feedback.
  • Perform API testing and support performance/load testing as needed.
  • Mentor junior QA team members and improve QA processes.
  • Communicate testing status, risks, and blockers to stakeholders.

Required Skills & Qualifications

Automation Testing

  • Selenium WebDriver with Java (3+ years)
  • TestNG/JUnit for test management
  • Maven/Gradle for build management
  • Page Object Model (POM) design pattern
  • Data-driven and keyword-driven frameworks
  • Playwright for modern web testing
  • CI/CD tools (Jenkins, GitHub Actions)
  • Git/GitHub/Bitbucket version control

Manual Testing

  • STLC/SDLC expertise
  • Test case/test plan/test strategy writing
  • Functional, regression, smoke, sanity, integration, UAT testing
  • Defect lifecycle and bug reporting best practices
  • Cross-browser/platform web testing

Tools & Technologies

  • JIRA/Bugzilla for defect tracking
  • Postman/REST Assured for API testing
  • SQL for test data validation
  • Agile/Scrum methodologies

Experience Requirements

  • Total Experience: 5+ years in Software QA
  • Automation Experience: 3+ years with Selenium/Java
  • Playwright: Hands-on experience preferred; Python knowledge a plus

Soft Skills & Attributes

  • Excellent analytical and problem-solving skills
  • Strong written/verbal communication
  • Team collaboration and independent work
  • Proactive quality focus
  • Attention to detail
  • Deadline-driven task management
summary: Senior QA Engineer with 5+ years in automation (Selenium/Java, Playwright) and manual testing, collaborating with development teams to ensure software quality.
